mapper.insert: INSERT INTO form_reports (form_id, reporter_ip, reporter_user_id, reason, detail, status) VALUES (#{formId}, #{reporterIp}, #{reporterUserId}, #{reason}, #{detail}, #{status})
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM form_reports r
r.status = #{status}
SELECT id, form_id, reporter_ip, reporter_user_id, reason, detail, status, handled_by, handled_at, created_at FROM form_reports WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM form_reports WHERE form_id = #{formId} AND status = 'PENDING'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM form_reports WHERE status = #{status}
